name: ravendb-mcp
description: Read-only MCP diagnostics server for RavenDB.
long_description: A local, read-only MCP diagnostics server for RavenDB. Point it at a cluster and your AI agent can inspect cluster, database, index, task, storage, and performance state, plus logs, support packages, and read-only data, across 21 read-only tools. Connection-string secrets are masked in the returned JSON.

RAVENDB_URLS.title: RavenDB URL(s)
RAVENDB_URLS.description: Node URLs of your cluster, comma or semicolon separated. Use an https URL for a secured cluster.

RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PATH.title: Client certificate (.pfx)
RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PATH.description: Secured (HTTPS) clusters only. Leave empty for an unsecured cluster.

RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD.title: Certificate password
RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD.description: Only if your .pfx certificate has a password.
